name: codex-sol-fusion
description: Sol Max directs dynamic, task-shaped Luna, Terra, and Sol Codex subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Sol Max directs dynamic task-shaped workers.
interface.longDescription: Keeps GPT-5.6 Sol at max in the main session as planner, subagent controller, consequential decision maker, and final authority while dynamically routing bounded work to pinned Luna, Terra, or Sol Codex subagents.
defaultPrompt: Use $gpt-5-6-orchestrator and keep GPT-5.6 Sol at max in the main session.
Have main-session Sol decide, dynamically launch and control pinned Luna, Terra, or Sol Codex subagents, and retain every consequential decision and final acceptance.
Verify worker proof, direct tests, review evidence, and the current workflow ledger before closing work.
